taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
must_have_quals: A bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science or a related field, 3-5+ years of demonstrated outstanding expertise in constructing and deploying web applications or interactive websites, Expertise in JavaScript technologies (GoLang, React, TypeScript), Prior experience with back-end development technologies (Java, NodeJS), Prior experience with open source authorization frameworks such as openFGA, SpiceDB, or other similar ReBAC models is a major plus, Established track record of delivering robust and intricate user interfaces, Profound knowledge of web technologies, encompassing the DOM, web security, asynchrony, workers, and performance optimization, Familiar with a variety of cloud and automation concepts, practices, and procedures, Proficiency in developing and implementing RESTful services within Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, or Azure, Experience with developing, observing, and operating products using hyper-scaled public clouds such as Azure or AWS cloud platforms
core_responsibilities: Address complex design obstacles directly, crafting outstanding web experiences that captivate users, Promote design thinking within development teams, encouraging collaboration between engineers and designers to build reusable, scalable code and cohesive user experiences, Interact with colleagues through pair programming and peer reviews to navigate advanced coding challenges, fuel innovative ideas, and refine groundbreaking methodologies, Work on creating permission systems that scale and help modernize legacy permissions frameworks for Adobe's flagship Customer Experience Orchestration products
job_summary: Adobe is seeking a Software Development Engineer to join their innovative team in Lehi. The role involves addressing complex design obstacles, crafting web experiences, and promoting collaboration between engineers and designers to build scalable code and cohesive user experiences.
